'''vadhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadoff|leadoff]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadoff|leadoff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vadhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædhæpæth|vædhæpæth]] || [[word:vædhæpæj|vædhæpæj]] || [[word:vædhæpæsh|vædhæpæsh]] || [[word:vædhæpæ|vædhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhadhapath|vadhadhapath]] || [[word:vadhadhapaj|vadhadhapaj]] || [[word:vadhadhapash|vadhadhapash]] || [[word:vadhadhapa|vadhadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhapath|vadhapath]] || [[word:vadhapaj|vadhapaj]] || [[word:vadhapash|vadhapash]] || [[word:vadhapa|vadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhafpath|vadhafpath]] || [[word:vadhafpaj|vadhafpaj]] || [[word:vadhafpash|vadhafpash]] || [[word:vadhafpaf|vadhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadhapatha|vadhapatha]] || [[word:vadhapaja|vadhapaja]] || [[word:vadhapasha|vadhapasha]] || [[word:vadhapaka|vadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadhapath|vadhapath]] || [[word:vadhapaj|vadhapaj]] || [[word:vadhapash|vadhapash]] || [[word:vadhapa|vadhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadhapathal|vadhapathal]] || [[word:vadhapajal|vadhapajal]] || [[word:vadhapashal|vadhapashal]] || [[word:vadhapakal|vadhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadhapathatha|vadhapathatha]] || [[word:vadhapajaja|vadhapajaja]] || [[word:vadhapashasha|vadhapashasha]] || [[word:vadhapaka|vadhapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadhapathan|vadhapathan]] || [[word:vadhapajan|vadhapajan]] || [[word:vadhapashan|vadhapashan]] || [[word:vadhapakan|vadhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadhapathaoro|vadhapathaoro]] || [[word:vadhapajaoro|vadhapajaoro]] || [[word:vadhapashaoro|vadhapashaoro]] || [[word:vadhapakaoro|vadhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
